archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Dark Command Center Variant)
vibe: Professional command center, trading terminal, SOC dashboard. Powerful, calm, highly structured, data-dense.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: High-density 'Control Room' grid layout. Zero wasted space, strict alignment.
layout_and_spacing.app_shell: Left Sidebar (16rem, collapsible) + Main Content Area + Right Live Activity Panel (20rem).
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense. p-3 or p-4 inside cards, gap-4 between grid items.
layout_and_spacing.borders_and_radii: Use rounded-sm (2px) everywhere. No large rounded corners. Hard 1px borders on all containers (border-zinc-800).
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal to none. Rely on borders and background tints for depth, not shadows.

components.buttons: Flat design. Primary is white on black (bg-white text-zinc-950). Secondary is transparent with border (border-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300).
components.cards_and_panels: bg-zinc-950 or bg-zinc-900 with 1px border-zinc-800. No heavy glassmorphism, just solid dark surfaces.
components.tables: Dense rows, text-sm. Sticky headers with bg-zinc-900. Subtle border-b on rows (border-zinc-800/50).
components.badges: Pill-shaped, text-xs font-mono. Use status colors defined in color section.
components.navigation: Client-first navigation in left sidebar. Avatar + Name at top, followed by modules (Workflows, Results, Settings).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Fast and snappy. 150ms ease-in-out transitions. Always specify hover text color.
motion_and_interactions.live_activity: Use a subtle pulsing dot (animate-pulse) next to active agents. Logs should smoothly auto-scroll.
motion_and_interactions.workflows: For active 'Strategy Sprints' or 'Audits', apply the 'Tracing Beam' effect (a subtle moving gradient border or active glow) to signify processing.

media_and_assets.icon_library: @phosphor-icons/react (Command: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) - Use Duotone or Regular weights for a technical look.

images.description: Dark cinematic abstract texture for empty states, login screens, or subtle app backgrounds.
Moody fiber optic node symbolizing AI connection and live data processing.

media_and_assets.rules: NEVER use placeholder services (via.placeholder.com). Use the provided image URLs exclusively.

testing_and_accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. Every interactive element (button, link, form input, menu item) MUST include a kebab-case data-testid attribute describing its role.
testing_and_accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum WCAG AA contrast against zinc backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a pure dark-mode Command Center application. Do not invert a light theme.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid with three distinct vertical areas: Navigation sidebar, Main Action area, and Right-side Live Activity/Log feed.
Use raw Tailwind HTML for layout framing to avoid strict Shadcn container limits, but use customized Shadcn components for all inputs, dialogs, and tables.
Fonts: Use Outfit for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body, and JetBrains Mono for logs/system data.
Emphasize the 'Approval-first' experience by making pending tasks highly visible with amber accents.
All containers must have explicit borders (border-zinc-800) and sharp or very slightly rounded corners (rounded-sm) to maintain a technical, serious vibe.
Do NOT add decorative gradients. The UI must feel like a precision tool.
